email.subject: Your results — {exam_title}
email.results_announcement: The results for the exam "{exam_title}" are now available.
email.pass_message: Congratulations! You have passed this exam.
email.fail_message: You did not reach the passing threshold for this exam.
email.receipt_body: Your exam "{exam_title}" was successfully submitted on {submitted_at}. You will receive your results once grading is complete.
email.footer: This email was sent automatically by {institution_name}. Please do not reply.
